# `themes/<name>.toml`

**Path:** `~/.partty/themes/<name>.toml`
**Format:** TOML
**Auto-created:** no (generated by theme builder or manually)

## Sections

### `version`

Always `1`.

### `name`

Display name (cosmetic, defaults to filename stem).

### `[colors]`

Flat key-value map of CSS custom properties. Keys are CSS variable names.

```toml
[colors]
--term-bg = "#1a1b26"
--term-fg = "#c0caf5"
--accent-primary = "#7aa2f7"
--ui-gray-900 = "#16161e"
```

Common keys:

| Key | Purpose |
|-----|---------|
| `--term-bg` | Terminal background |
| `--term-fg` | Terminal foreground |
| `--term-cursor` | Cursor color |
| `--term-selection-bg` | Selection background |
| `--accent-primary` | Accent (borders, highlights) |
| `--accent-primary-light` | Accent lighter shade |
| `--ui-gray-50`–`--ui-gray-900` | Grayscale ramp |
| `--panel-bg` | Panel backgrounds |
| `--panel-border` | Panel borders |
| `--input-bg` | Input backgrounds |
| `--input-border` | Input borders |
| `--pane-divider` | Pane divider |
| `--pane-divider-hover` | Pane divider hover |

### `[prefs]`

Optional. Overrides config.toml when the theme is active. Any section from
`config.toml` is valid here. Omitted sections/fields fall back to the user's
`config.toml`.

## Examples

**Minimal (colors only):**
```toml
version = 1
name = "my-theme"

[colors]
--term-bg = "#1a1b26"
--term-fg = "#c0caf5"
--accent-primary = "#7aa2f7"
--ui-gray-900 = "#16161e"
--ui-gray-800 = "#1f2335"
```

**With preference overrides:**
```toml
version = 1
name = "soft-amber"

[colors]
--term-bg = "#1a1816"
--term-fg = "#ebdbb2"
--accent-primary = "#d79921"

[prefs.pane]
blur = true
corner_radius = 8.0

[prefs.cursor]
style = "bar"
blink = false

[prefs.font]
size = 13.0
```

When this theme is applied, `pane.blur`, `pane.corner_radius`, `cursor.style`,
`cursor.blink`, and `font.size` are set from the theme. All other preferences
remain as defined in `config.toml`.
